$schema: Baseline of pre-existing pattern hits for scripts/security-regression-scan.mjs. NEW hits fail CI. To add an entry, include a rationale so reviewers understand why the pattern is safe in that specific site.

entries.rationale: getMyEvent scopes by host_id = context.userId; the host is reading their own event and is entitled to every column, including compliance_notes/permit_details/insurance_policy_number. Not guest-facing.
public.enqueue_email pgmq wrapper. Only pgmq schema referenced; search_path not required for safety here because the function body calls fully-qualified `pgmq.*` functions.
public.read_email_batch pgmq wrapper; body uses fully-qualified pgmq.* calls only.
public.delete_email pgmq wrapper; body uses fully-qualified pgmq.* calls only.
public.move_to_dlq pgmq wrapper; body uses fully-qualified pgmq.* calls only.

Historical ADD TABLE. Superseded by a later migration that drops public.private_room_bookings from the supabase_realtime publication entirely; no realtime broadcast is active. Any future re-add must include a column allowlist and will be checked against this rule.
